titleStmt.title: SII 15.6: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 6. (B.K. No. 137 of 1926-27.) HUYILGŌḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Māruti temple.

This is dated the Chālukya-Vikrama year 35, Khara, Chaudige-amāvāsye, Sunday. Chaudige or Chautiya-amāvāsye seems to refer to the Śrāvaṇa-amāvāsye coming before Vināyaka-chaturthi. The details would thus regularly correspond to 1111 A.D., August 6.

It seems to record a gift of land by Daṇḍanāyaka Gollara Dēvaṇṇa in the presence of the Hundred and Twenty Mahājanas of Hūligōḷa. The date cited above is engraved after the formal end of the record. The epigraph is fragmentary.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gōve mallanoḷu . gadya . svastyanēka guṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita vēdavēdōpāṁga śāstrānēka smri
tipurāṇavā samādhi śīlasampanna
rappa srīmadagrahāraṁ hūligōḷadūroḍeya pramukhavāgi mahājana nūṟirppadiṁ barumaśēṣamirddu gollara
nāgaṇna keyyaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakara
magaṁ gollara dēvaṇnaṁ holadamēre panne
raḍu mattarkkeyamaṁ pūrvva drārkkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭanāvanāgiyu pratipāḷi
sidaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgeyargghyatīrttha sāyira kavileymaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷegumaṁ po
nnūḷkaṭṭisi sāsirvvaru vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda phalamidanaḷidaṁge vāra ṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ pra
yāge yargghyatīrtthadoḷsāyira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇaranaḷida mahāpātakanakku .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhā ginē pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . cāḷukya vikrama varṣada 35 neya khara saṁvatsarada caudige yama
vāse yādityavāradaṁdu
Digital edition of SII 15.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
